{
  "society_power": 6.0,
  "state_power": 7.0,
  "society_change": -2.5,
  "state_change": 4.5,
  "key_event": "Partition, independence, and state consolidation",
  "reasoning": "Partition weakened civil society due to displacement, while state power was significantly strengthened through independence, integration of princely states, and economic policies."
}
